$note: TRUSTED Phase 2 broker policy. This is the ONLY allowlist the publish broker reads at request time — it is NEVER loaded from the coder-writable config/workspace.json. The active per-workspace config directory is bind-mounted read-only at runtime and this file is read from /etc/mrw-broker/config/broker-policy.json; it is not baked into the image. It must live OUTSIDE the coder-writable worktrees/workspace tree (the broker fail-closes otherwise). Keep allowed_push_orgs/allowed_push_hosts/branch_prefix in sync with workspace.json for your workspace.
allowed_push_orgs_note: GitHub orgs/users push may target. Empty = host-only (no org restriction). The broker enforces this IN-PROCESS; it does not depend on the pre-push hook or jq.
allowed_push_hosts_note: Hosts a push may target. The broker validates BOTH host and org, then RECONSTRUCTS a canonical https://<host>/<org>/<repo>.git URL from the validated pieces and pushes to that explicit URL from a broker-private scratch repo.
branch_prefix_note: A publish request's branch must start with this prefix (matches config/workspace.json).
